title: Misato plastered at work
wikitext:
[]: Misato plastered at work             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Sat Feb 05, 2011 2:00 pm Random thought so bare with me: NERV personel are probably forbidden from consuming alcohol while on duty right (I don't even why I'm saying "probably"). Misato goes home as usual and gets wasted as usual... but then an Angel attacks! Misato returns to work but she's drunk off her ass. What happens next?

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Sat Feb 05, 2011 2:01 pm The show ends.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Feb 05, 2011 2:07 pm Misato arrives on the scene and tries to give orders, but only manages to throw up. Maya beats the shit out of her for stealing her line.

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Sat Feb 05, 2011 2:09 pm SaltyJoe wrote: Misato arrives on the scene and tries to give orders, but only manages to throw up. Maya beats the shit out of her for stealing her line.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Feb 05, 2011 2:19 pm Gendo assumes command

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Sat Feb 05, 2011 2:35 pm Xard wrote: Gendo assumes command

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Sat Feb 05, 2011 2:54 pm DevRei17 wrote: What would happen to Misato?

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Sat Feb 05, 2011 3:02 pm But she was off duty. It wouldn't be her fault per say....err....never mind.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Feb 05, 2011 3:02 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sat Feb 05, 2011 3:45 pm BornIn1142 wrote: What does Misato do with her life without NERV?

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Sat Feb 05, 2011 3:56 pm Allemann wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Feb 05, 2011 4:09 pm Actually, a hentai doujin series has Misato becoming an Adult Film star due to being forced to quit Nerv, but that's because an Angel somehow made her grow a--well, I'll just leave it at that. >_> So, what happens next you say? Misato comes up with a brilliant strategy like normal. Who's to say she's NOT drunk when the Angels are attacking? Also did anybody else think in that newly added 2.22 scene that she's drunk while spinning around in her chair during the synch tests?

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Sat Feb 05, 2011 4:15 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Actually, a hentai doujin series has Misato becoming an Adult Film star due to being forced to quit Nerv, but that's because an Angel somehow made her grow a--well, I'll just leave it at that. >_> So, what happens next you say? Misato comes up with a brilliant strategy like normal. Who's to say she's NOT drunk when the Angels are attacking? Also did anybody else think in that newly added 2.22 scene that she's drunk while spinning around in her chair during the synch tests?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Feb 05, 2011 4:38 pm THAT BOARD or using .

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Sat Feb 05, 2011 4:55 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: THAT BOARD or using .

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Feb 05, 2011 5:30 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Actually, a hentai doujin series has Misato becoming an Adult Film star due to being forced to quit Nerv, but that's because an Angel somehow made her grow a--well, I'll just leave it at that. >_>

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Feb 05, 2011 5:44 pm [s]Yes.[/s] Maybe. >_> But the circle itself is pretty hilarious (Tengu no Tsuzura) with their works so no worries there. And now I hate myself for bringing this thread horribly off topic by going into perv-mode. So uhh TOPIC! DevRei17 wrote: Anywho, do you think Hyuga would try anything if he realized Misato was drunk?

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sat Feb 05, 2011 6:22 pm Misato will stumble into the command center and yell out the words "Party time" in a hideous drunken shriek. On cue, a disco ball will descend from the ceiling and dance music will flood the room. Everyone will then hop out of their seats and burst into synchronized hip gyrations. Gendo and Fuyutski would look on in annoyance and then reluctantly join in. Maya will rip-off her top and jump on Ritsuko, who is holding a strategically placed champagne bottle between her legs. The cork will pop off, and foam will drip onto the floor while Maya and Ritsuko laugh in unison. Hyuga will cop a feel, but Misato will bitch slap him, then pass out. Aoba will set the security cameras to record Maya and Ritsuko, who are drunkenly making out on top of Caspar. Ritsuko will push Maya away momentarily and kick Caspar, yelling "Up yours, mother!" before vomiting. Shinji and Asuka will look on contemptuously from the entry plugs. The Angel will be defeated through the power . . . of song . Specifically, the greasy club ballad that everyone is making out to.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sat Feb 05, 2011 6:31 pm I notice a distinct lack of Rei in this scenario.

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Sat Feb 05, 2011 6:31 pm MugwumpHasNoLiver wrote: Misato will stumble into the command center and yell out the words "Party time" in a hideous drunken shriek. On cue, a disco ball will descend from the ceiling and dance music will flood the room. Everyone will then hop out of their seats and burst into synchronized hip gyrations. Gendo and Fuyutski would look on in annoyance and then reluctantly join in. Maya will rip-off her top and jump on Ritsuko, who is holding a strategically placed champagne bottle between her legs. The cork will pop off, and foam will drip onto the floor while Maya and Ritsuko laugh in unison. Hyuga will cop a feel, but Misato will bitch slap him, then pass out. Aoba will set the security cameras to record Maya and Ritsuko, who are drunkenly making out on top of Caspar. Ritsuko will push Maya away momentarily and kick Caspar, yelling "Up yours, mother!" before vomiting. Shinji and Asuka will look on contemptuously from the entry plugs. The Angel will be defeated through the power . . . of song . Specifically, the greasy club ballad that everyone is making out to.
